common.passwordPolicy: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase and lowercase letters

footer.tagline: Boutique hospitality curated with premium restraint, direct booking clarity, and a calm editorial luxury tone.

home.heroSubtitle: Hand-picked homes along Egypt's most beautiful coastlines — Fouka Bay, GAIA, Hacienda West, Marassi and Ain Sokhna.
home.projectsEmpty: Projects will appear here once they are added.
home.featuredEmpty: Featured homes will appear here once published units are available.
home.trustTitle: Booked like a hotel, felt like home.
home.verifiedBody: Handpicked homes inspected for comfort, cleanliness, and that unmistakable coastal calm.
home.seamlessBody: Clear nightly pricing and instant WhatsApp assistance from inquiry to check-in.
home.dedicatedBody: On-ground support throughout your stay — so you can simply arrive and exhale.
home.hostBody: Let us manage your coastal villa — guest care, pricing, and stays handled with Soul.

search.emptyHintRent: Try clearing filters or widening your dates.
search.emptyHintSale: Try clearing filters or choosing another destination.

listing.amenitiesEmpty: Amenities will appear here once added in the PMS.
listing.signInToReview: Please sign in to submit a review for this unit.
listing.reg0: Reservations are exclusively open to families. Single-gender groups are permitted for non-Arab guests only.
listing.reg1: Arab couples must submit an official marriage certificate prior to booking. Visitors allowed are only of first-degree relatives.
listing.reg2: Pets are prohibited (not even really cute ones).
listing.reg4: Please be respectful of your neighbors and keep noise to a minimum from 10:00 PM – 8:00 AM.
listing.addReviewBody: Share your experience to help future guests choose with confidence.
listing.commentPlaceholder: What stood out during your stay?
listing.needRating: Please select a star rating from 1 to 5.
listing.needComment: Please write a short comment about your stay.
listing.postFailed: Could not post review. Please try again.
listing.loadReviewsFailed: Unable to load reviews right now.
listing.reviewsEmpty: No reviews yet. Be the first guest to share your stay.
listing.signInReviewSuffix: to submit a review for this unit.
listing.gaiaBeachSummary: By stay length — 3 nights: 1,900 (extra 2,500) · 4 nights: 2,500 (extra 3,100) · 5+: 3,500 / 7 nights (extra 4,100)
listing.saleInquireNote: Our team will share details and arrange a viewing.

booking.overlapWarning: Selected nights overlap a blocked or reserved date.
booking.minStay: Minimum stay is {{count}} nights for this unit.
booking.guestLoadHint: Adults count as 1 guest and children count as 0.5 guest.
booking.overCapacity: You can still book above capacity, but you'll pay for each extra guest (higher beach-access / extra-guest rate).
booking.notesPh: Any special request or booking note
booking.needDates: Please choose both check-in and check-out dates.
booking.needId: Please upload at least one National ID or Passport photo.
booking.overlap: The requested dates overlap with a blocked or reserved night.
booking.uploadSubtitle: Select and upload National ID or Passport photos
booking.drop: Choose a file or drag & drop it here
booking.formats: JPEG, PNG, and WEBP formats, up to {{mb}}MB · max {{max}} photos
booking.idMandatory: It's mandatory for Egyptians to add the National photo ID for any one above 15 years old.
booking.idMandatoryAr: إلزامي للمصريين إضافة صورة البطاقة الشخصية لأي شخص فوق ١٥ سنة.
booking.badType: Please choose JPEG, PNG, or WEBP images.
booking.authBody: Create an account or sign in before requesting payment. Your reservation details stay on this page.
booking.staffError: Please sign in with your guest account (email), not a staff login.

payment.noDataHint: Start from a listing and use Request to book to open checkout.
payment.pendingNote: Your request stays pending until Soul staff accepts. We typically reply within 24 hours.
payment.title: Secure Checkout
payment.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to pay — requests stay pending until staff accept.
payment.policy0: A valid national ID or passport is required for all guests
payment.policy1: IDs and phone numbers must be sent after booking to issue entry permits
payment.policy2: Stay is strictly for registered guests only - no visitors allowed
payment.policy3: For couples (Arab nationalities): an official marriage certificate is required
payment.policy4: Unmarried couples, mixed groups, or youth-only groups are not allowed
payment.policy5: Management reserves the right to request proof of relationship
payment.policy7: Quiet hours from 12:00 AM to 8:00 AM
payment.policy9: Any damages to the chalet or furniture will be deducted from the security deposit
payment.signedInAs: Signed in as {{who}}. Choose one option below to submit your reservation request.
payment.cashHint: Cash bookings are submitted as Pending and reviewed manually. A deposit may be required.
payment.instapayHint: InstaPay requests are submitted with Pending status. You will receive an official response within 24 hours.
payment.paymobHint: You will be redirected to Paymob. After payment, your request remains Pending until staff accept.
payment.needAuth: Please sign in or create an account before confirming payment.
payment.needMethod: Please select a payment method first.
payment.needId: Please upload ID or passport photos before confirming payment.
payment.cardNotConfigured: Card checkout is not configured yet. Please try InstaPay or cash, or contact Soul.
payment.instapaySuccess: InstaPay reservation request is marked as Pending. You will receive an official response within 24 hours.
payment.cashSuccess: Cash reservation request recorded as Pending. A deposit clearance may be required to confirm your booking.
payment.callbackOkBody: Your payment was submitted{{booking}}. Your stay request remains Pending until Soul staff accepts — typically within 24 hours.
payment.callbackFailBody: Something went wrong with the payment gateway. You can return to the listing and try again, or inquire on WhatsApp.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Name
checkout.pendingNote: Requests stay pending until Soul staff accepts. Unpaid holds expire automatically.

bookingSuccess.title: Request received
bookingSuccess.body: Booking reference {{id}}. Your request is awaiting confirmation from our team — we will confirm or follow up shortly.

auth.createSubtitle: Book coastal stays and manage your trips in one place.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send a reset link if it exists.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.teamMembersOnly: Team members only — guest accounts cannot sign in here.
auth.resetSubtitle: Create a strong password to regain access to your Soul account.
auth.invalidLink: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new one.

account.title: Account
account.pointsBody: You earn 1 Soul Point for every 1 EGP on an accepted reservation. Points can later be exchanged for vouchers and free nights.
account.hkBody: You're currently staying{{unit}}. You already receive one housekeeping visit; request another for a time during your stay.
account.hkPending: You already have a housekeeping request in progress. You can request another after it is completed.
account.hkSuccess: Housekeeping requested. Our team will follow up.
account.totalPoints: Total {{amount}} EGP · {{points}} Soul Points when accepted
account.wishlistLocal: Saved on this device. Sign in to sync across devices.
account.wishlistEmpty: Save homes while browsing — sign in to sync across devices.

about.heroBody: We offer unique places suited for your comfort — curated stays along Egypt's most beautiful coastlines.
about.story1: Soul Hospitality was shaped around one idea: premium homes should feel both effortless and memorable. We curate short stays, longer living arrangements, and owner experiences with the same discipline, so every property is presented with clarity, calm, and consistency.
about.story2: Our team focuses on the details that make hospitality feel refined rather than transactional. From furnishing standards and guest touchpoints to property stewardship and responsive support, every layer is designed to keep the experience warm, clean, and reliable.
about.qualityBody: We maintain a high finish across every unit, from material choices and styling to cleanliness, consistency, and the standard of the guest experience.
about.teamworkBody: Our operations, guest support, and property care teams work as one system so owners and guests feel a smooth, coordinated service at every step.
about.respectBody: We respect every property as an asset, every guest as a priority, and every owner relationship as a long-term partnership built on trust.
about.integrityBody: Clear communication, transparent operations, and honest reporting guide how we manage bookings, care plans, and everyday hospitality decisions.
about.responsibilityBody: We take ownership of the details that protect value over time, keeping the property experience organised, dependable, and carefully maintained.
about.innovativeBody: We refine service flows, presentation, and digital touchpoints so the brand feels modern without losing the calm and luxury expected from Soul.

owners.title: List your coastal home with Soul
owners.subtitle: Share a few details and our team will get in touch to help you publish your unit — guest care, pricing, and stays handled with Soul.
owners.formBody: Tell us about yourself and your property. We typically respond within one business day to discuss next steps.
owners.bullet0: Professional guest communication and stay operations
owners.bullet1: Pricing guidance tailored to your destination
owners.bullet2: A calm, premium listing experience for your home
owners.success: Thank you — our team will contact you soon to discuss listing your property.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.body: Bookings can be completed online via Paymob or confirmed with our team after an inquiry. Pricing is nightly and sourced from live daily rates.

legal.placeholder: Legal copy for {{title}}. Replace with final counsel-approved text before production launch.

compoundsPage.title: Destinations & Projects
compoundsPage.body: Browse destinations (areas) and their projects (compounds). Use search to filter homes.

contact.title: Speak to the Soul Hospitality team
contact.subtitle: Ask about stays, partnerships, hosting, or recruitment. We respond with the same calm and premium service standards we bring to every property.
contact.channelsBody: Each option opens a clean external action so you can reach the team without a form submission step.
contact.emailDesc: Send the team a direct message
contact.locationDesc: Open the office location in Maps

careers.title: Current Openings
careers.subtitle: Join the Soul Hospitality team and help us deliver a calm, premium experience for every guest and owner.
careers.empty: There are no open positions at the moment. Please check back soon.
careers.success: Application submitted. Thank you — we will be in touch.
